en: Hey, girl. How you doing? No, no, no.
Don't get up. I'm just going to join you.
That all right, J? You're not expecting anybody, are you?
You wouldn't be playing me like that, would you?
ko: 설마 나한테 그런 짓을 하진 않겠지?

en: So I'm just going to sit here in this seat and tell you a little secret.
ko: 그러니까 여기 앉아서 작은 비밀 하나 알려줄게.

en: Yep, I got in my big car and followed you,
ko: 내 큰 차를 타고 너를 따라갔어.

en: and I saw everything, J. And I mean, so mad.
I wanted to run you down, Rambo style.
But I chilled. Hey, hey, whoa, whoa, wait.
I went back to our apartment and canceled all our credit cards.
All your nice jewelry, I put it right up my ass.
ko: 네 비싼 보석들 전부 내가 숨겼어.

en: Because you got to learn about loyalty, baby girl.
